meaning: n.蜂房,蜂箱,闹市v.(使)入蜂箱,群居
examples: A dark cloud of bees comes swarming out of the hive.
Glass hives offer a close-up view of the bees at work, with the queen bee in each hive marked by a white dot.
Tapping on the hive excited the bees.
The ski village, however, while a welcome hive of activity, has long been an architectural hodgepodge.
The social network has helped create the buzzing hive of information that we all inhabit.
